description_long: This advertising board features a tall, rectangular display with a wide, sturdy base for stability. The front face showcases a vibrant, static printed poster for a movie, with prominent graphics and text, including two mirrored portraits and a cityscape background. The frame is thick, solid, and black, providing a bold border around the advertisement and enhancing its visibility. The sides and back of the board are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the display area on the front. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The board is freestanding and designed to attract the attention of pedestrians and passersby.
description: A freestanding, rectangular advertising board with a thick black frame and a static printed movie poster on the front. The base is wide and solid, and the sides and back are plain black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full movie poster with two mirrored faces and cityscape, framed by a thick black border and supported by a wide base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the board's slim profile and the depth of the thick black frame and base, with no visible content.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, displaying the movie poster and the prominent black frame and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and plain black surface, with no visible content.
attribute_frame_design: thick black frame with straight edges and a wide, solid base
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for a movie
